items.name: breach-collapse
items.prompt: A heavy non-musical sci-fi horror breach collapse: low metallic implosion, wet stone cracking, distant pressure-wave thump, toxic energy fizzling out. Designed for a dark pixel-art shooter when a monster portal seals. No melody, no vocals, one-shot, 1.5 to 2 seconds.

items.name: choir-whisper-loop
items.prompt: Loopable alien hive-mind ambience for a dark pixel-art shooter: layered organic whispers with no words, sub-bass biotech hum, faint chitin clicks, toxic electrical shimmer. Seamless loop, eerie and quiet, 4 seconds.

items.name: hellfire-pulse
items.prompt: Short Pyre hellfire power pulse for a dark pixel-art shooter: compressed flame whoomp, ember crackle, hot mechanical ignition, small bass kick. Aggressive but clean UI/gameplay cue, no vocals, no melody, under 1 second.

items.name: hit-impact
items.prompt: Short meaty alien bullet impact for a dark pixel-art shooter: wet chitin slap, tiny bone crack, soft blood spurt, no tonal beep, one-shot, 0.25 seconds.
